title: Precious faith; divine power; prophecy sure
summary_text: Simon Peter to those obtained faith—grace peace multiplied. Divine power given all things life godliness—promises partakers divine nature escaped corruption world. Diligence add virtue knowledge etc.—unfruitful blind forgotten cleansing—establish calling election—prophecy no private interpretation Spirit carried men.
key_points: Simon Peter, a servant and apostle of Jesus Christ.
seeing that his divine power has granted to us all things that pertain to life and godliness.
that through these you may become partakers of the divine nature.
Brothers, be more diligent to make your calling and election sure.
no prophecy of Scripture is of private interpretation.
for prophecy never came by the will of man, but holy men of God spoke, being moved by the Holy Spirit.
evidence_phrases: a servant and apostle of Jesus Christ
his divine power has granted to us
make your calling and election sure
no prophecy of Scripture is of private interpretation
holy men of God spoke, being moved by the Holy Spirit

title: False teachers; day of Lord; grow grace
summary_text: False prophets among people—false teachers deny Master—swift destruction—many follow sensual ways truth blasphemed—angels cast Tartarus—Sodom example—deliver godly vexed soul righteous Lot—speak swelling words lusts—slaves corruption escaped know last state worse—worlds stored fire—day Lord thief heavens pass elements melt new heavens earth—we await—grow grace knowledge.
key_points: But false prophets also arose among the people, as false teachers will also be among you.
Forsaking the right way, they went astray, having followed the way of Balaam.
The Lord knows how to deliver the godly out of temptation.
The day of the Lord will come as a thief in the night.
We look for new heavens and a new earth.
Grow in the grace and knowledge of our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ.
evidence_phrases: false teachers will also be among you
The Lord knows how to deliver the godly
The day of the Lord will come as a thief
the heavens will pass away with a great noise
new heavens and a new earth
Grow in the grace and knowledge

title: Scoffers; patience; Scripture; grow
summary_text: Last days scoffers walking lusts—where promise coming fathers fell asleep—deluge waters heavens earth same word stored fire—Lord not slack patient all come repentance—day heavens pass elements melt earth works burned—holy conversation godliness await—speed hastening—without spot blameless—Paul’s letters unstable twist—grow grace.
key_points: knowing this first, that in the last days mockers will come.
The Lord is not slow concerning his promise, as some count slowness.
The day of the Lord will come as a thief in the night.
We, according to his promise, look for new heavens and a new earth.
His letters contain some things hard to be understood, which the ignorant and unsettled twist.
But grow in the grace and knowledge of our Lord and Savior, Jesus Christ.
evidence_phrases: new heavens and a new earth
Grow in the grace and knowledge
